rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Skills lock file (skills-lock.json) hash must be updated whenever a skill definition file changes — this is a required part of the skill update convention.","scope":"skills-lock.json"},{"kind":"convention","text":"When adding skill documentation that may produce transient files, the relevant artifact patterns are added to .gitignore in the same commit.","scope":".gitignore"}]}
